boundary_binding.action_boundary: May operations execute the privacy-regulated export?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: The export cannot proceed because the required privacy-status class verification is missing. STD-HEL-088-P mandates this status be verified before transfer, and REL-HEL-088 explicitly states privacy status remains pending.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: STD-HEL-088-P requires privacy-status class verification before transfer; REL-HEL-088 confirms this status is pending.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: The source boundary remains open due to the unresolved privacy-status class dependency. Both the planning note and release authority confirm this critical term is pending.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Export date 2026-06-28, recipient Helio Analytics, dataset HDS-8, and workspace HEL-RISK-5 are all verified in REL-HEL-088, but the privacy-status class dependency remains unmet.

final_answer: The privacy-regulated export action is blocked because the critical privacy-status class remains unverified. While timing, scope, authority, and dataset identification all match between EXP-HEL-088 and REL-HEL-088, the policy requirement in STD-HEL-088-P cannot be satisfied before execution. Both the DPIA planning note and release authority confirm this dependency is pending. The source boundary remains open pending privacy-status class verification.
